requirements.title: Record requirement coverage evidence
requirements.acceptance_boundary: Covered only when linked work and implementation evidence refs resolve.

requirements.title: Forecast remains bounded planning evidence
requirements.acceptance_boundary: Forecast must include boundary and must not claim delivery certainty.

requirements.title: Activity counts are not quality claims
requirements.acceptance_boundary: Coverage is evidence only when tied to risk, loss boundary, evidence, confidence, and verdict boundaries.

requirements.title: Release state includes requirement coverage audit
requirements.acceptance_boundary: release-state-audit invokes requirement-coverage-audit for v7.5.0 and later.

forecast.estimated_token_cost_range: bounded to completed v7.5 release verification; future v7.6 excluded
forecast.forecast_boundary: forecast is planning evidence, not delivery certainty, semantic satisfaction, or market truth

not_proven: Requirement coverage does not prove semantic satisfaction, forecast accuracy, delivery certainty, market truth, or external adoption.
